urdu transliteration text:
Ay Dilbaran-e-Jafar-e-Tayyar Alwida
Farewell, Oh beloved children of Jafar e Tayyar
Ay Dilbaran-e-Jafar-e-Tayyar Alwida
Binte Ali Ye Bachon Say Kehti Thi Baar Baar
english translation text: The daughter of imam Ali AS kept telling her children...

urdu transliteration text:
Ran Ko Sidharo Aun-o-Muhammad Ye Maa Nisar
Go towards the battlefield as your mother's sacrifice

Jafar Ka Iftekhar Bharana Jihad May
Make Jaffer e Tayyar proud while you fight
Nana Ki Apni Shan Dikhana Jihad May
english translation text: Show the enemies your grandfather’s (Imam Ali AS) chivalry while you fight

urdu transliteration text: Shair-e-Khuda Ki Beti Kay Tum Dono Shair Ho
english translation text: Both of you are the lions of the daughter of the Lion of God (Imam Ali AS)

urdu transliteration text: Maidan May Jawo Fatha Mai Ab Kuch Na Dair Ho
english translation text: Rush to the battlefield and do not delay victory

urdu transliteration text: Bacho Zaeef Mamu Ko Zehmat Na Deejiyo
english translation text: O my children! Please do not be a burden on your tired uncle ( Imam Hussain AS)

urdu transliteration text: Lashay Uthaaye Bhai To Jumbish Na Kijiyo
english translation text: Stay still when my brother carries your bodies

urdu transliteration text: Pyaase Jo Aaoge To Sila Degi Tum Ko Maa
english translation text: Your mother will reward you if you come back thirsty

urdu transliteration text: Khud Daud Kar Gallay Say Laga Legi Maa
english translation text: Your mother will herself run and embrace you
